workLog.task: Resolve issue #2012: get_unresolved_review_threads emitted raw GraphQL per-thread nodes that disagreed with get_pr_review_threads flat shape, crashing consumers
workLog.outcome: Added canonical transform_review_thread to scripts/github_core/api.py (single source of truth), made both pr scripts use it, enriched the unresolved GraphQL query and added --include-comments. Verified no consumer reads the old per-thread shape (wait_for_unresolved_zero reads only top-level keys).
